**2. Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL $360 strike, 2026-06-18, 56 DTE, $9.70/$10.00, delta 0.34, 19.1% annualized return

No qualifying trades - all showing "WAIT" signals due to expensive IVP (55-87%) or trend weakness

None available
